summary: Full E2E verification of RIBA v2.2 Magic Generator (Suno-style). Created 7 new backend pytest cases covering /api/ai/generate-lyrics, /api/ai/generate-track, /api/ai/workspace (list/delete/file) — all 7 pass. Re-ran prior backend suite (test_riba_api + test_bantu_hardware + test_bantu_parity + test_ai_endpoints) — 48/48 pass (the previous assistant-fallback bug from iteration_12 is now resolved). Frontend Playwright drove the full modal flow end-to-end: every required data-testid is present, Mode toggle reveals/hides [data-testid='duration-input'], all three lyrics tabs swap their pane correctly, Quick tags append to styles input, Create yields a spinner via [data-testid='status-line'] and a new [data-testid^='card-'] within ~10s, Play/Import buttons are disabled (no audio_url because FAL_KEY missing) and Delete is enabled. Card deletion removes the card from the grid. Procedural covers render with zero tags (pure CSS gradients). Main DAW regression sanity check: 7 menus + Event submenu (Magic Generator + AI Assistant entries) still load with no console errors.

verified_passing.POST /api/ai/generate-lyrics (Bikutsi/ph: 200 OK with {title, sections[>=1], tags[], fallback:bool, id} — fallback path returns 3 sections as spec requires
verified_passing.POST /api/ai/generate-track (no FAL_KEY): 200 OK with {fallback:true, fallback_reason:'FAL_KEY_MISSING', id, audio_url:null} — graceful placeholder card
verified_passing.GET /api/ai/workspace: 200 OK with {items:[...]} including newly created entries
verified_passing.DELETE /api/ai/workspace/{id}: 200 OK with {deleted, remaining:int}; subsequent GET confirms entry removed
verified_passing.Mode toggle: advanced shows duration-input; simple hides it
verified_passing.Lyrics tabs Write/Prompt/Instrumental: Each toggles the correct pane (textarea / generate-lyrics-btn / 'Instrumental only' note)
verified_passing.E2E Create: Prompt 'Phoenix rising' + tag-bikutsi + create-btn → spinner observed → new card with PHOENIX·RISING tags in workspace-grid
verified_passing.Card action button states: play disabled=true, import disabled=true (no audio_url), delete disabled=false — matches spec
verified_passing.Delete card: Card count drops by 1 after click on delete-{id}
verified_passing.Procedural cover: 0 tags inside cards — verified gradient-only covers
verified_passing.Regression backend pytest: 48/48 prior tests still pass (test_ai_endpoints assistant-fallback bug from iter12 is now fixed)
verified_passing.DAW regression sanity: 7 top-level menus render, Event submenu has both Magic Generator and AI Assistant entries, no error elements on root page

critical_code_review_comments: generator.py is clean (~250 lines, well-organized). Index file is a flat JSON list capped at 60 entries — acceptable for a single-user DAW workspace; if multi-user is ever added, swap for Mongo (already wired via MONGO_URL).

generator.py _local_tags() takes only the first whitespace-split token of `style`, so 'Rumba, Bikutsi' becomes the single tag 'RUMBA,'. Trailing comma is preserved in the workspace tag list (seen in the screenshot as 'RUMBA,'). Minor cosmetic — recommend `re.split(r'[,\s]+', style)[0].strip(',')` to drop the trailing punctuation.

generator.py catches all exceptions during fal.ai call with `except Exception as exc: type(exc).__name__` — good defensive behavior; the spec verifies FAL_KEY_MISSING fallback explicitly, which works.

Workspace index file path uses Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / 'static' / 'workspace' — make sure the `static` dir is included in any deploy bundle; currently it auto-creates with mkdir parents=True which is fine.
Frontend MagicGeneratorModal.jsx exposes all required testIds correctly; procedural covers verified to be pure CSS (no broken-image fallback risk). No tags in cards.
Server.py mounts generator_router under prefix '/ai' inside api_ai which uses '/api' → final path '/api/ai/...' — correctly matches both the spec and frontend calls.
Minor: server.py still uses deprecated `@app.on_event('shutdown')` — non-blocking deprecation warning but worth migrating to lifespan handlers eventually.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all spec assertions for Magic Generator modal verified)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed workspace entries and clean up the targeted one in test_delete_removes_entry. Other TEST_-marker entries (lyrics/tracks) remain in the workspace index — capped at 60 by _push_entry. Recommend the main agent prune them or rely on the cap.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified the RIBA v2.2 Magic Generator (Suno-style) end-to-end with zero functional bugs. Backend totals: 55/55 pytest passing (1 slow Demucs test still deselected by design — opt in with `-m slow`). Frontend testIds confirmed working: mode-simple/advanced, inject-audio/voice, prompt-input, lyrics-tab-{write,prompt,instrumental}, lyrics-text, generate-lyrics-btn, styles-input, tag-{asiko,makossa,bikutsi,rumba,afrobeat,soukous,highlife}, duration-input, create-btn, status-line, workspace-grid, refresh-workspace, card-{id}, play-{id}, import-{id}, delete-{id}. FAL_KEY remains intentionally unconfigured — every /api/ai/generate-track call hits FAL_KEY_MISSING fallback gracefully and yields a card with audio_url=null (Play+Import disabled, Delete enabled). When FAL_KEY is added, re-run TestGenerateTrack — the fallback branch tests will become false-positive (would still report fallback false unexpectedly), so a guard like `if os.getenv('FAL_KEY'): pytest.skip(...)` could be added.
rca of the issue: No bug RCA needed — all spec items pass.
